# feature

Equivalent quick commands: `/ck:feature`, `/ck:new-feature`.
Equivalent skill shorthands: `$ck-feature`, `$ck-new-feature`.

Use the `command-router` alias logic, then route to these canonical skills:
- $brownfield-mapping
- $architecture-discovery
- $plan-feature

Related agents:
- system_mapper
- plan_architect

Related scripts:
- scripts/new-feature.sh <feature-name-or-title>

Typical artifacts touched:
- plans/active/<timestamp>-<slug>/
- analysis.md
- architecture.md
- plan.md

Instructions:
- preserve any payload after the alias and pass it into the resolved workflow
- read `docs/project-context/index.md` and `AGENTS.md` before risky work
- keep the result architecture-safe and proportional to the change class
- note: Best for new L1 features inside an existing repository.

Output format:
# Resolved command
## Canonical workflow
## Next artifact or command
## Key risks or assumptions
